name: Escapement
description: The exposed interior of a planet-sized machine whose builders are long gone. Continent-wide gear plains grind through thousand-year rotations, snapped mainsprings lie coiled across canyons, and oil fens burn wherever the friction runs hot. Everything still ticks, slow and out of rhythm, maintained by things that no longer know why.
mood: Patient, rusted, and faintly wrong — a whole world still working for no one. Every silence ends with a tick that lands half a beat late.
biome: brass gear plains cut by spring canyons and burning oil fens

enemies.name: Tin Soldier
enemies.role: cheap wind-up melee that marches in ranks
enemies.description: A dented tin automaton with a bayonet and a turning key in its back.

enemies.name: Clockwork Hound
enemies.role: fast pack melee that closes distance
enemies.description: A dog-shaped brass frame with gear guts and snapping jaws.

enemies.name: Oiler
enemies.role: ranged fodder that sprays slowing hot oil
enemies.description: A squat automaton with a tank body and a brass spray nozzle.

enemies.name: Sweeper
enemies.role: support fodder that shoves players out of position
enemies.description: A wheeled automaton pushing a wide wire broom.

enemies.name: Cultist Hook
enemies.role: melee that drags targets out of formation
enemies.description: A robed cultist swinging a long iron hook.

enemies.name: Cultist Torch
enemies.role: ranged fire that ignites oil and burns over time
enemies.description: A robed cultist carrying an oil flask and a lit torch.

enemies.name: Cog Thrower
enemies.role: midrange artillery that hurls heavy gears
enemies.description: A broad automaton that pries loose cogs and flings them.

enemies.name: Spring Snake
enemies.role: long-lunge melee that strikes from surprising range
enemies.description: A snapped mainspring that coils and strikes like a snake.

enemies.name: Brass Golem
enemies.role: slow tank with heavy melee swings
enemies.description: A man-shaped heap of brass plates driven by slow pistons.

enemies.name: Bell Knight
enemies.role: armored melee whose toll stuns nearby players
enemies.description: An armored automaton with a chime-tower bell for a chest.

enemies.name: Piston Ram
enemies.role: charger that lines up and hits with big knockback
enemies.description: A low four-legged engine with a battering piston for a head.

enemies.name: Winder Priest
enemies.role: support that rewinds damaged automatons back to health
enemies.description: A cultist in gear-hung robes carrying a bundle of winding keys.

enemies.name: Shepherd Engine
enemies.role: huge boss that sweeps whole rows clear each turn
enemies.description: A house-sized engine on rollers with wide raking arms.

enemies.name: Iron Foreman
enemies.role: summoner boss that calls fodder automatons to work
enemies.description: A towering automaton clutching a fistful of rusted work orders.

enemies.name: Cult Master
enemies.role: boss that buffs cultists and sacrifices them to heal itself
enemies.description: A masked cultist turning a great brass key mounted on a staff.

enemies.name: Clock Spider
enemies.role: mobile boss that lays ticking mines and strikes at reach
enemies.description: A tower-sized brass spider with a clock face for an abdomen.

items.name: Tin Sword
items.description: A cheap tin blade, light and a little bendy.

items.name: Brass Saber
items.description: A curved saber cast from polished brass.

items.name: Sawblade
items.description: A mill saw fitted with a leather grip; cuts ragged.

items.name: Clock Hand
items.description: A tower clock's minute hand, ground to an edge.

items.name: Iron Pike
items.description: A long iron pike with superior reach.

items.name: Piston Spear
items.description: A piston drives the head forward with extra force.

items.name: Drag Hook
items.description: A hooked pole that yanks enemies closer.

items.name: Crossbow
items.description: A simple crossbow with a steady iron draw.

items.name: Ratchet Bow
items.description: A gear ratchet holds a far heavier draw.

items.name: Coil Bow
items.description: Limbs of mainspring steel; every shot hits hard.

items.name: Brass Staff
items.description: A plain brass staff that channels a simple blast.

items.name: Chime Staff
items.description: Hung with chimes; its tone rattles enemies.

items.name: Winding Key
items.description: A staff-sized brass key humming with stored tension.

items.name: Great Wrench
items.description: A machinist's wrench big enough to need both hands.

items.name: Gear Axe
items.description: An axe head cut from a broken gear segment.

items.name: Pendulum Maul
items.description: A clock pendulum swung on its rod like a maul.
